title: Crossopetalum integrifolium
taxonomy: Crossopetalum integrifolium belongs to the family Celastraceae. It is a species of flowering plant in the genus Crossopetalum. The genus Crossopetalum is part of the order Celastrales. This species is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. Crossopetalum integrifolium is a shrub or small tree.
uses: Crossopetalum integrifolium, a plant native to the Americas, has been found to have various medicinal uses.
